title: Production Hardening — 11 Flow & Integrity Fixes
description: Fix all critical and high/medium severity issues identified in the gap analysis: temp file leaks, credit deduction order, double-refund prevention, expired URL handling, Gemini validation, prompt length cap, job payload credit storage, dead-end state fix, JSON regex, scene file cleanup, session mutex.

stories.title: Temp file cleanup in generateVideoWithFallback
acceptanceCriteria: generateVideoWithFallback has a finally block that deletes temp file created by ensureLocalImage when resolvedRef !== params.referenceImage
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Credit deduction order: image_set, clone_style, campaign enqueue-first
acceptanceCriteria: generate.ts image_set flow: enqueueVideoGeneration called before deductCredits
generate.ts clone_style flow: enqueueVideoGeneration called before deductCredits
generate.ts campaign flow: enqueueVideoGeneration called before deductCredits
If deductCredits fails after enqueue, the enqueued job is removed via enqueuedJob.remove()
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Atomic refund lock to prevent double/triple refund on BullMQ retry
acceptanceCriteria: video-generation.worker.ts uses Redis SET refund:{jobId} NX EX 3600 before executing any credit refund
If the SET returns null (key already exists), the refund is skipped
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Validate image URL freshness in make_video_from_image
acceptanceCriteria: callbacks/generation.ts make_video_from_image validates generateLastImageUrl with a HEAD request before use
If URL is expired or unreachable, user is shown a message asking to re-upload
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Gemini scene ID match rate validation
acceptanceCriteria: hpas-engine.ts generateScenePromptsWithAI checks match rate of returned sceneId values
If fewer than 50% of scenes matched, console.warn is emitted
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Prompt length cap before video provider loop
acceptanceCriteria: video-fallback.service.ts truncates enriched prompt to 800 chars max before provider loop
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Store creditCost in BullMQ job payload for correct refunds
acceptanceCriteria: generate.ts passes creditCost in the BullMQ job data for all 4 flows
video-generation.worker.ts proportional refund uses job.data.creditCost with fallback
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Fix CUSTOM_DURATION_INPUT dead-end state
acceptanceCriteria: message.ts CUSTOM_DURATION_INPUT handler resets ctx.session.state to DASHBOARD on invalid input
Error reply includes a back button
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Fix Gemini JSON extraction regex to be non-greedy
acceptanceCriteria: hpas-engine.ts uses non-greedy matchAll loop to find first valid JSON array
Multiple arrays in Gemini response do not cause JSON.parse failure
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Clean up partial scene download files on failure
acceptanceCriteria: video-generation.worker.ts processExtendedScenes wraps scene download in try/catch
On download failure, partial file is deleted before continuing
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Per-user session mutex to prevent concurrent write corruption
acceptanceCriteria: message.ts updateSessionDirectly acquires Redis NX lock before read-modify-write
If lock cannot be acquired, update is skipped with a warning log
npm run build succeeds
